strengths: 17+ years of continuous software engineering experience across web, mobile, embedded, and cloud systems — comfortably clears the 15-year minimum
Active hands-on AI and agentic infrastructure work at re:cinq, including MCP code generators and frameworks supporting agentic workflows
Entrepreneurial track record: founded GISCollective, contributed to early-stage startups (WatchUp, RIDE Capital), and demonstrated ability to own and ship full products independently
concerns: No advanced degree; holds a BS in CS and a BA in Fine Arts — the preferred Master's/PhD in an AI-related field is absent
AI depth is shallow and very recent: AI-agent work only began April 2025, with no demonstrated record of building recognized AI products or platforms at scale

Career trajectory is Senior/Staff IC focused on technical execution, not director-level strategic advisory — no evidence of advising external customers, influencing roadmaps, or shaping organizational AI strategy
response.justification: Bogdan brings a genuine breadth of engineering experience and a builder's instinct across many domains, and his current role shows early movement into AI tooling. However, the Principal Engineer (AI Strategy) role is a director-level IC position requiring recognized AI expertise, a history of advising strategic customers, and the ability to shape cloud and AI product direction at an organizational level — none of which his profile substantively demonstrates. His AI exposure is too recent and his positioning too execution-oriented to be competitive against candidates with deep AI backgrounds and strategic influence experience.
